title: May 28th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - i got a 90s flow with a 20s wobble lyrics
            - i got a 90s flow with a 20s wobble
            - if you like to get low
            - come catch my show
            - through the tiny window
            - at the bottom of a bottle
            - i took the high
            - road the lightning
            - struck twice
            - frightening the fuck right out of my friends
            - so if i didn't do it for the gram
            - why then
            - pound for pound i'm a heavyweight
            - that's a hash tag
            - catsh that get your head straight
            - so abstract i don't trend i levitate
    - professional
